loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing input active power and energy — per-phase input power and reactive energy are not directly measured for this asset; reactive power is derived from total active power and power factor.

loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase output voltage trends (R, Y, B) and summary statistics (Average, Max, Min) from the UPS-01 output meter. Threshold lines are omitted as no dedicated threshold columns are measured.
